instructions: Annotations now correctly placed on after_login.png

annotations.title: Automatic Login / Welcome Message
annotations.description: Users see "Welcome back! Successfully logged in to Survey Corps" without creating an account - confusing and raises security concerns.

annotations.title: Wrong Account Name (Survey Corps)
annotations.description: App is DreamDuo but shows "Survey Corps" - wrong branding or leftover test data.

annotations.title: Incorrect Sample Tasks
annotations.description: Random unrelated tasks (Football, Capstone Meeting, Book the Field) appear as if belonging to another user.

annotations.title: Pre-populated User Data
annotations.description: User avatar (E) and existing tasks suggest logging into someone else's account - privacy concern.

annotations.title: No Logout or Account Settings Visible
annotations.description: No clear way to logout or access account settings from the main view.
annotations.element_description: Left navigation sidebar missing account options
